plans.title: Strategy Domain Contract
plans.description: Define frontend strategy registry, capability schema, selection rules, and release semantics.

tasks.title: T001 Define frontend strategy registry schema for flutter and svelte
tasks.description: Create stable strategy identifiers and registry payloads.

tasks.title: T002 Define strategy capability fields
tasks.description: Represent APK, Bridge, Workbench, web preview, Cloudflare API, and D1 support.

tasks.title: T003 Define strategy selection rules
tasks.description: Handle explicit strategy, platform inference, and unsupported combinations.

tasks.title: T004 Define strategy source-of-truth requirements
tasks.description: Require strategy metadata across manifests, workflows, runtime metadata, and output.

plans.title: Project Factory Intake And Manifest
plans.description: Expose frontendStrategy through options, API schemas, mobile UI, draft state, and manifest planning.

tasks.title: T005 Add Project Factory option payloads
tasks.description: Expose known frontend strategies from backend options.

tasks.title: T006 Add API schema fields for frontendStrategy
tasks.description: Carry selected strategy through draft and job payloads.

tasks.title: T007 Add mobile UI strategy selector
tasks.description: Default to Flutter and expose Svelte web-first option.

tasks.title: T008 Persist selected strategy
tasks.description: Store selected strategy in Project Factory draft state.

tasks.title: T009 Add manifest validation for unsupported combinations
tasks.description: Block Svelte Android installability without wrapper support.

tasks.title: T010 Add generated spec plan tasks strategy text
tasks.description: Name selected strategy and release capabilities in generated SDD artifacts.

plans.title: Flutter Strategy Hardening
plans.description: Extract current Flutter path into an explicit strategy without regressing Initial Preview Release.

tasks.title: T011 Refactor current generated Flutter files into strategy helpers
tasks.description: Make Flutter generation explicit and reusable.

tasks.title: T012 Keep Flutter Android preview workflow
tasks.description: Maintain android-preview-v* and preview runtime defines.

tasks.title: T013 Keep Flutter web preview build pointed at Cloudflare API
tasks.description: Validate Flutter web preview API_BASE_URL.

tasks.title: T014 Keep Flutter Workbench preview visibility tests
tasks.description: Owner/admin Workbench visibility remains required.

tasks.title: T015 Add Flutter strategy regression tests
tasks.description: Prove existing Initial Preview Release behavior is unchanged.

plans.title: Svelte Web Strategy Generation
plans.description: Generate independent Svelte web projects with Cloudflare preview config and tests.

tasks.title: T016 Generate Svelte app scaffold
tasks.description: Create apps/web Svelte project structure.

tasks.title: T017 Generate Svelte package scripts
tasks.description: Add install, lint, test, build, and preview validation scripts.

tasks.title: T018 Generate Svelte runtime config
tasks.description: Require Cloudflare preview API for Initial Preview Release.

tasks.title: T019 Generate Svelte config tests
tasks.description: Fail on localhost, mock, placeholder, or missing preview API config.

tasks.title: T020 Generate Svelte web preview build script
tasks.description: Build Svelte assets for Cloudflare preview.

tasks.title: T021 Add Svelte strategy metadata
tasks.description: Write strategy metadata to project and release contracts.

tasks.title: T022 Add Svelte web preview manifest entries
tasks.description: Declare build command, output dir, and static assets.

plans.title: Shared Cloudflare Preview Runtime
plans.description: Reuse Worker, D1, health, and Preview API routes across strategies.

tasks.title: T023 Reuse Cloudflare Worker route and D1 migrations
tasks.description: Keep shared backend runtime strategy-neutral.

tasks.title: T024 Make Worker local preview tests strategy-neutral
tasks.description: Validate Worker behavior for Flutter and Svelte clients.

tasks.title: T025 Validate strategy-specific asset output before ready
tasks.description: Cloudflare apply must verify assets for the selected strategy.

plans.title: Strategy-Aware Release Orchestration
plans.description: Make release phases, output, Bridge registration, and blockers depend on declared capabilities.

tasks.title: T026 Skip Android APK phases only when strategy does not promise APK
tasks.description: Do not fail web-only Svelte on missing APK.

tasks.title: T027 Make Svelte web release output explicit
tasks.description: Report installable_android=false and web readiness evidence.

tasks.title: T028 Block Svelte plus Android installability without wrapper
tasks.description: Avoid overpromising installable APKs.

tasks.title: T029 Prevent Bridge installable registration for web-only Svelte
tasks.description: Only register installable apps when artifacts exist.

tasks.title: T030 Add future wrapper extension point
tasks.description: Reserve svelte-capacitor-android without implementing it.

plans.title: Validation Matrix And Rollout
plans.description: Add contract, generator, Cloudflare, release output, UI, and SDD validation coverage.

tasks.title: T031 Add strategy source-of-truth validation
tasks.description: Fail when strategy is missing from generated sources.

tasks.title: T032 Add release profile validation for strategy promises
tasks.description: Match phases to declared capabilities.

tasks.title: T033 Add backend strategy tests
tasks.description: Cover selection, manifest validation, and payloads.

tasks.title: T034 Add Flutter strategy generator tests
tasks.description: Protect current Flutter output.

tasks.title: T035 Add Svelte strategy generator tests
tasks.description: Verify Svelte output and config.

tasks.title: T036 Add Cloudflare strategy asset tests
tasks.description: Verify strategy-specific asset validation.

tasks.title: T037 Add release output overpromise tests
tasks.description: Fail on APK or Bridge claims without evidence.

tasks.title: T038 Add mobile UI strategy tests
tasks.description: Cover selector and blockers.

tasks.title: T039 Add Workbench readiness strategy fields
tasks.description: Expose selected strategy and capability blockers.

tasks.title: T040 Update documentation and runbooks
tasks.description: Document Flutter and Svelte preview release paths.

tasks.title: T041 Validate spec plan tasks traceability metadata
tasks.description: Keep SDD artifacts consistent.

tasks.title: T042 Run full validation suites
tasks.description: Run Project Factory, Cloudflare, mobile UI, Svelte generator, and SDD tests.
